message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
}

actor Admin
actor Customer
participant "Games Interface" as GI
participant "Games Input Interface" as GII
control "Games Controller" as GC
database "Database" as DB

Admin -> GI : CRUD games
GI -> GII : Input games info
GII -> GC : Send CRUD request to server
GC -> DB : Query request to DB
DB --> GC : Response

alt [success case]
  GC --> GI : CRUD successfully
else [fail case]
  GC --> GI : CRUD fail
end

GI -> Admin : Show notification
Customer -> GI : View Game
GI -> GC : FETCH game from server
GC -> DB : Query games
DB --> GC : Games data
GC --> GI : Games data
GI -> Customer : Show all games
@enduml
